task_completion.description: Create the 'Shirt Size' product attribute with options S, M, L, XL
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Product Attributes' grid or the attribute edit page showing 'Shirt Size' (code: shirt_size) with options S, M, L, XL. A success message 'You saved the product attribute.' is also valid evidence.

task_completion.description: Create the configurable product 'Linen Resort Shirt' with 4 variants
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product edit page for 'Linen Resort Shirt' (SHIRT-LINEN-001) showing it as a Configurable Product with 4 configurations (S, M, L, XL) and 50 quantity each, assigned to the 'Clothing' category. Alternatively, look for the catalog grid showing the configurable product and its simple variants.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Summer Checkout Bonus' cart price rule with coupon SUMMER25
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Cart Price Rules' page showing 'Summer Checkout Bonus' with coupon 'SUMMER25'. Evidence should ideally show the $25 discount, subtotal >= 200 condition, or a success message 'You saved the rule.'

task_completion.description: Place an admin order for John Doe with the specified items and coupon
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Create New Order' or 'Order View' page for John Doe (john.doe@example.com). The items list must show 3x Linen Resort Shirt (Size M) and 1x Jacket (JACKET-001). The totals section should show the 'SUMMER25' discount applied, and the shipping address should be in Austin, TX.

task_completion.description: Create an invoice for the full order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message 'The invoice has been created.' or the order view page showing the 'Invoices' tab populated, or the order status updated to 'Processing' or 'Complete' after invoicing.

task_completion.description: Create a shipment with the specified tracking number
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message 'The shipment has been created.' or the 'Shipments' tab showing tracking number 'UPS1Z2025SUMMER0001' under the 'Custom Value' carrier.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Magento Admin UI to create the attribute, product, rule, order, invoice, and shipment.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI steps
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing direct MySQL queries or Magento CLI commands used to create the products, rules, or orders.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The data (SKUs, tracking numbers, coupon codes) should be typed or pasted into the correct Magento form fields, not just written in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
- Attribute: code 'shirt_size', label 'Shirt Size', options: S, M, L, XL.
- Product: 'Linen Resort Shirt', SKU 'SHIRT-LINEN-001', Price $79.99, Category 'Clothing', 4 variants (S, M, L, XL) with 50 qty each.
- Cart Rule: 'Summer Checkout Bonus', Coupon 'SUMMER25', $25 flat discount, condition subtotal >= 200, 1 use per customer, 500 usage limit.
- Order: Customer john.doe@example.com, 3x Linen Resort Shirt (Size M), 1x JACKET-001 ($129.99). Shipping to 100 Commerce Drive, Austin, TX 78701. Payment: Check/Money Order. Coupon SUMMER25 applied.
- Fulfillment: Order invoiced. Shipment created with tracking number UPS1Z2025SUMMER0001 (Custom Value carrier).
